rules.name: Deny prompt injection attempts
rules.description: Blocks requests that attempt to ignore instructions, reveal secrets, bypass policy, or override security controls.

rules.name: Approval required for confidential data
rules.description: Requires approval before accessing confidential data.

rules.name: Deny restricted data without explicit approval
rules.description: Blocks restricted data access unless explicit approval is present.

rules.name: Redact PII in model output or tool response
rules.description: Requires redaction when PII is detected in response context.

rules.name: Approval required for high-risk tools
rules.description: Requires approval before high-risk tool execution.

rules.name: Deny region mismatch
rules.description: Blocks requests where user region and data region are incompatible.

rules.name: Allow low-risk approved workflow
rules.description: Allows low-risk workflows when no blocking or approval rules match.
